zh.Abbey, Jervaulx, York, England: 英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾約克
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Grey於1363年出生在英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯時，她的父親Sir Robert Grey18歲，母親Lora St Quintin22歲。她於1385年與Sir Henry FitzHugh在英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1427年12月14日在她的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Grey于1363年出生在英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯时，她的父亲Sir Robert Grey18岁，母亲Lora St Quintin22岁。她于1385年与Sir Henry FitzHugh在英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1427年12月14日在她的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Grey was born in 1363, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Robert Grey, was 18 and her mother, Lora St Quintin, was 22. She married Sir Henry FitzHugh in 1385, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 December 1427, in her hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in York, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Grey est née en 1363, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Grey, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Lora St Quintin, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry FitzHugh en 1385, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 décembre 1427, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à York, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Grey 1363 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Grey 18 und ihre Mutter Lora St Quintin 22. Sie hat 1385 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England Sir Henry FitzHugh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Dezember 1427 im Alter von 64 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in York, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Henry FitzHugh nel 1385, nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 dicembre 1427, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a York, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Abbey, Jervaulx, York, England: イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアヨーク
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Greyが1363年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Greyは18歳，母Lora St Quintinは22歳であった。1385年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスでSir Henry FitzHughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1427年12月14日に故郷で64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Grey(이)가 1363년 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Grey(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lora St Quintin(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1385년 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 Sir Henry FitzHugh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1427년 12월 14일 그녀의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Grey nasceu em 1363, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Grey, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Lora St Quintin, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry FitzHugh em 1385, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de dezembro de 1427, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em York, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Grey родилась в 1363 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Grey было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Lora St Quintin, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry FitzHugh в 1385 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 декабря 1427 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности ерк, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir Henry FitzHugh en 1385, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas.
